description_long: This is a glossy black grand piano with a classic curved body and three sturdy legs. The piano features a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three gold-colored pedals beneath the keyboard. The lid is fully closed, giving the instrument a sleek, uninterrupted surface across the top. The piano's exterior is highly polished, reflecting light and emphasizing its elegant contours. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached to the instrument.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a closed lid, full keyboard, and three gold pedals, featuring a highly polished, elegant exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three gold pedals, and the piano's curved body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's curved right side and the closed lid, with only the edge of the keyboard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, curved back and the closed lid, with no keyboard or pedals visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the straight edge of the piano and the closed lid, with the keyboard edge just visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-sized keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
